name: Titan Logix Corp.
summary: Titan Logix Corp., a technology company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and marketing of technology fluid management solutions in Canada, the United States, and internationally. Its products include guided wave radar gauges for level measurement and overfill prevention; level gauges for storage tanks; and communication systems for remote alarming and control. The company also offers mobile tank gauges, including level gauges, displays, telematics, and accessories; flow metering products; tank scan products; and end of life equipment. It serves oil and gas, chemical, produced water, vacuum, aviation, and fuel/lubricant industries. The company was formerly known as Titan Pacific Resources Ltd. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Edmonton, Canada.
